title: Three triangular UFOs spotted in Vera Cruz* [2004]

text_preview:
*ARX ​​648 – due to the wear of the copy of the file, the information about the State where the event occurred was unreadable – the witness who reported the sighting informed he lived in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul. This infomation let us deduce in which one of the Vera Cruz cities in Brazil [there are 5 in Brazil] the sighting took place.

DEC 19th, 2004. 1:00 am. Duration: 2 minutes. In the city of Vera Cruz, *State of Rio Grande do Sul*, on a clear night, three people observed 3 unidentified flying objects shaped like triangles and white in color. According to the witnesses of the sight
summary: Three people in Vera Cruz-RS observed 3 white triangular UFOs flying in formation at very fast speed in a North/South direction on Dec 19, 2004.
